creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
Ctrl-F for 20150630 in UPDATING.

I added

> options	RANDOM_YARROW	# Legacy /dev/random algorithm.

to my custom buld config (pretty much follow this: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/kernelconfig-config.html)

and I get past the build error. It's possble I'm getting this error because I'm on 10.1-RELEASE.

However, my efforts to do buildworld first, and compile the /sys/modules/random failed. I gave up and proceeded to add the option above.
